Description: This component is a surface-mount Schottky barrier rectifier diode designed for high-efficiency power rectification. It features a low forward voltage drop, a metallurgically bonded construction for reliability, and is housed in a DO-214AB (SMC) plastic case. It is ideal for applications requiring high current handling in a compact package, such as switch-mode power supplies, freewheeling diodes, and reverse polarity protection, with a voltage range from 20V to 100V and a continuous current rating of 3.0A.

KeyParameters.Maximum Recurrent Peak Reverse Voltage (: 20V to 100V (depending on specific SS3x part number)
KeyParameters.Maximum DC Reverse Current (IR): 0.15 mA (at 25°C, rated VDC) / 2 mA (at 100°C, rated VDC)

Functions.FunctionDescription: Positive terminal for forward current flow. Identified as the end without the color band.
Negative terminal. Identified by a color band on the component body.
